seoTitle: Caboonbah vs Caffey — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Caboonbah and Caffey. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Caboonbah and Caffey.
heading: Caboonbah vs Caffey — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Caboonbah, Queensland and Caffey, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Caboonbah has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Caffey (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Caboonbah or Caffey safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Caboonbah has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Caffey scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Caboonbah scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Caffey scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Caboonbah or Caffey?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Caboonbah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
